rationale.R1.6: The user asked to 'Polish this,' making sentence-level clarity, grammar, and concision the load-bearing responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Polishing should preserve the text’s existing hedges and degrees of certainty without introducing unwarranted definitiveness.
rationale.RX.2: Edits must not strengthen or broaden claims beyond what the original text states.
rationale.RX.3: Scope must remain limited to wording and flow improvements without content changes or higher-level restructuring.
rationale.RX.4: Wording changes should not introduce misleading operational implications that could cause misuse of the described setup.
rationale.RX.5: All numerical details and factual specifics must be preserved so the polished text remains traceable to the original.
